description: You are a Marketing Manager auditing the 'Books to Scrape' website (https://books.toscrape.com/) for SERP display issues. Your goal is to identify page titles that exceed 568 pixels in width, which causes truncation in Google search results. Export the page title data to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/page_titles_serp.csv' and generate a remediation report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/title_truncation_report.txt'. The report must include the total number of pages crawled, the number of titles exceeding 568 pixels, the percentage of affected pages, a list of at least 5 specific truncated page titles with their pixel widths, and specific recommendations for shortening them. Login: user=ga
